goal: Build the first UR10 cuRobo pick-place canonical: UR10 picks 1 cube off conveyor, drops in bin. Validates the new robot_family='ur10' branch in the cuRobo handler. Realizes the UR10-arm half of #2 / #3 / #25 / #27 / #33.
thoughts:
Six UR10-cuRobo specifics for CP-69 (this is the FIRST UR10 canonical):
1) UR10 has 1.3m reach (vs Franka 0.85m) — allows wider workspace; conveyor + bin both at 0.6m radius are well in range.
2) UR10 mounts via import_robot(asset_library, 'UR10') at /World/UR10. No robot_wizard yet — that tool only knows franka_panda.
3) Base at [0, 0, 0.75] — sitting on the same 0.75m-top table as Franka canonicals, no pedestal needed for tabletop work.
4) target_source='curobo' + robot_family='ur10' — the new branch instantiates UR10(attach_gripper=True), uses ur10e.yml cuRobo config, plans to tool0 frame, and routes _grip_open/_grip_close to the surface (suction) gripper auto-attached at flange.
5) Single cube to keep validation simple — confirms motion plan + grip cycle works before scaling up.
6) Same physics as Franka canonicals: rubber material on cube, sleepThreshold=0, MBP broadphase, no GPU dynamics.
code:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.5, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

# UR10 from asset library — placed on table top (z=0.75)
import_robot(file_path="UR10", format="asset_library", dest_path="/World/UR10")
teleport_prim(prim_path="/World/UR10", position=[0, 0, 0.75])

# Conveyor — well within UR10's 1.3m reach
create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    position=[-0.5, 0.4, 0.78],
    size=[2.0, 0.4, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[0.2, 0, 0],
)

# Single cube on conveyor — flows past pick zone
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cube_1", prim_type="Cube", position=[-1.0, 0.4, 0.835], size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Cube_1", schema_name=api)
bulk_set_attribute(prim_paths=["/World/Cube_1"], attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold", value=0.0)
apply_physics_material(prim_path="/World/Cube_1", material_name="rubber")

# Output bin
create_bin(prim_path="/World/Bin", position=[0.5, -0.4, 0.75], size=[0.3, 0.3, 0.15])

# Pick sensor at conveyor mid-belt
add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path="/World/PickSensor", position=[0.4, 0.4, 0.835], size=[0.06, 0.06, 0.06])

# UR10 cuRobo pick-place controller — first call with robot_family='ur10'
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/UR10",
    robot_family="ur10",
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    belt_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    source_paths=["/World/Cube_1"],
    destination_path="/World/Bin",
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/ConveyorBelt", "/World/Bin"],
)
extension_notes: CP-69 is structurally CP-01 with Franka swapped for UR10. First canonical to exercise the new robot_family='ur10' branch in setup_pick_place_controller's cuRobo handler. Surface gripper auto-attached via UR10(attach_gripper=True). Form-gate validates build; runtime delivery is the next milestone.
failure_modes: Asset path drift: import_robot('UR10', asset_library) resolves to local Isaac Sim 5.0 assets — drift on Isaac Sim version bumps would manifest here first.

EE-frame mismatch: cuRobo plans to URDF tool0 link; SurfaceGripper attaches at /World/UR10/ee_link in the USD. The two frames are coincident in canonical UR10 but slight pose-drift may yield grip miss on first attempt.

Surface gripper proximity: cube must contact the ee_link suction surface within tolerance; cuRobo's plan must descend close enough. Default approach height (max(source_z, drop_z) + 0.2m) tested for Franka, may need ee_offset tweak for UR10.
Reach: UR10 1.3m vs Franka 0.85m — extra reach is forgiving for the conveyor at x=-1.0, but pose singularities differ between robots; cuRobo plan may take more IK seeds to converge.
verified_status: build-spec-2026-05-08; form-gate ✓; function-gate ✓ (UR10 cuRobo+conveyor delivers via raycast→FixedJoint workaround for IsaacSurfaceGripper bug)
code_template:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.5, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

# UR10 from asset library — placed on table top (z=0.75)
import_robot(file_path="UR10", format="asset_library", dest_path={{primary_robot.path}})
teleport_prim(prim_path={{primary_robot.path}}, position={{primary_robot.position}})

# Conveyor — well within UR10's 1.3m reach
create_conveyor(
    prim_path={{input_conveyor.path}},
    position={{input_conveyor.position}},
    size={{input_conveyor.size}},
    surface_velocity={{input_conveyor.surface_velocity}},
)

# Single cube on conveyor — flows past pick zone
create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[0].position}}, size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, schema_name=api)
bulk_set_attribute(prim_paths=[{{workpieces[0].path}}], attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold", value=0.0)
apply_physics_material(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, material_name="rubber")

# Output bin
create_bin(prim_path={{primary_destination.path}}, position={{primary_destination.position}}, size={{primary_destination.size}})

# Pick sensor at conveyor mid-belt
add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path={{pick_sensor.path}}, position={{pick_sensor.position}}, size={{pick_sensor.size}})

# UR10 cuRobo pick-place controller — first call with robot_family='ur10'
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    robot_family="ur10",
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path={{pick_sensor.path}},
    belt_path={{input_conveyor.path}},
    source_paths=[{{workpieces[0].path}}],
    destination_path={{primary_destination.path}},
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", {{input_conveyor.path}}, {{primary_destination.path}}],
)
